<= i < n :: forall j | 0 <= j < m ::\n     6→    grid[i][j] == 'W' || grid[i][j] == 'B')\n     7→}\n     8→\n     9→// A cell (i,j) lies inside the axis-aligned square with given center and half-side-length\n    10→ghost predicate CellInSquare(i: int, j: int, centerRow: int, centerCol: int, half: int)\n    11→{\n    12→  centerRow - half <= i <= centerRow + half &&\n    13→  centerCol - half <= j <= centerCol + half\n    14→}\n    15→\n    16→// The grid consists of exactly one black square of side length 2*half+1 (odd)\n    17→// centered at (centerRow, centerCol) in 0-indexed coordinates, with all other cells white\n    18→ghost predicate IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>,\n    19→                                   centerRow: int, centerCol: int, half: int)\n    20→  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n    21→  requires forall i | 0 <= i < n :: |grid[i]| == m\n    22→{\n    23→  half >= 0 &&\n    24→  centerRow - half >= 0 && centerRow + half < n &&\n    25→  centerCol - half >= 0 && centerCol + half < m &&\n    26→  (forall i | 0 <= i < n ::\n    27→    forall j | 0 <= j < m ::\n    28→      if CellInSquare(i, j, centerRow, centerCol, half)\n    29→      then grid[i][j] == 'B'\n    30→      else grid[i][j] == 'W')\n    31→}\n    32→\n    33→// There exists some black square painted on the grid\n    34→ghost predicate grid[i][j] == 'W' || grid[i][j] == 'B')\n}\n\n// A cell (i,j) lies inside the axis-aligned square with given center and half-side-length\nghost predicate CellInSquare(i: int, j: int, centerRow: int,                   centerRow: int, centerCol: int, half: int)\n  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < n :: |grid[i]| == m\n{\n  half >= 0 &&\n  centerRow - half >= 0 && centerRow + half < n &&\n  centerCol - half >= 0 && centerCol + half < m &&\n  (forall i | 0 <= i < n ::\n    forall j | 0 <= j < m ::\n      if CellInSquare(i, j, centerRow, centerCol, half)\n      then grid[i][j] == 'B'\n      else grid[i][j] == 'W')\n}\n\n// There exists some black square painted on the grid\nghost predicate HasBlackSquare(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>)\n  requires |grid| m, grid, cr, cc, h)\n}\n\nlemma RowOutsideHasNoBlack(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>, cr: int, cc: int, half: int, i: int)\n  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n  requires forall ii | 0 <= ii < n :: |grid[ii]| == m\n  requires IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, cr, cc, half)\n  requires 0 <= i < n\n  requires i < cr - half || i > cr + half\n  ensures 'B' !in grid[i]\n{\n  forall j | 0 <= j 1, c - 1, h);\n}","originalFile":"ghost predicate ValidGrid(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>)\n{\n  n > 0 && m > 0 && |grid| == n &&\n  (forall i | 0 <= i < n :: |grid[i]| == m) &&\n  (forall i | 0 <= i < n :: forall j | 0 <= j < m ::\n    grid[i][j] == 'W' || grid[i][j] == 'B')\n}\n\n// A cell (i,j) lies inside the axis-aligned square with given center and half-side-length\nghost predicate CellInSquare(i: int, j: int, centerRow: int, centerCol: int, half: int)\n{\n  centerRow - half <= i <= centerRow + half &&\n  centerCol - half <= j <= centerCol + half\n}\n\n// The grid consists of exactly one black square of side length 2*half+1 (odd)\n// centered at (centerRow, centerCol) in 0-indexed coordinates, with all other cells white\nghost predicate IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>,\n                                   centerRow: int, centerCol: int, half: int)\n  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < n :: |grid[i]| == m\n{\n  half >= 0 &&\n  centerRow - half >= 0 && centerRow + half < n &&\n  centerCol - half >= 0 && centerCol + half < m &&\n  (forall i | 0 <= i < n ::\n    forall j | 0 <= j < m ::\n      if CellInSquare(i, j, centerRow, centerCol, half)\n      then grid[i][j] == 'B'\n      else grid[i][j] == 'W')\n}\n\n// There exists some black square painted on the grid\nghost predicate HasBlackSquare(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>)\n  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < n :: |grid[i]| == m\n{\n  exists cr | 0 <= cr < n ::\n    exists cc | 0 <= cc < m ::\n      exists h: nat ::\n        IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, cr, cc, h)\n}\n\nlemma RowOutsideHasNoBlack(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>, cr: int, cc: int, half: int, i: int)\n  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n  requires forall ii | 0 <= ii < n :: |grid[ii]| == m\n  requires IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, cr, cc, half)\n  requires 0 <= i < n\n  requires i < cr - half || i > cr + half\n  ensures 'B' !in grid[i]\n{\n  forall j | 0 <= j < |grid[i]|\n    ensures grid[i][j] != 'B'\n  {\n    assert !CellInSquare(i, j, cr, cc, half);\n  }\n}\n\nlemma RowInsideHasBlack(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>, cr: int, cc: int, half: int, i: int)\n  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n  requires forall ii | 0 <= ii < n :: |grid[ii]| == m\n  requires IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, cr, cc, half)\n  requires 0 <= i < n\n  requires cr - half <= i <= cr + half\n  ensures 'B' in grid[i]\n{\n  assert CellInSquare(i, cc, cr, cc, half);\n  assert 0 <= cc < |grid[i]|;\n  assert grid[i][cc] == 'B';\n}\n\nmethod FindSquare(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>) returns (r: int, c: int)\n  requires ValidGrid(n, m, grid)\n  requires HasBlackSquare(n, m, grid)\n  ensures 1 <= r <= n && 1 <= c <= m\n  ensures exists h: nat ::\n            IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, r - 1, c - 1, h)\n{\n  // Extract ghost witnesses from HasBlackSquare\n  ghost var gcr: int :| 0 <= gcr < n &&\n    (exists cc | 0 <= cc < m :: exists h: nat ::\n      IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, gcr, cc, h));\n  ghost var gcc: int :| 0 <= gcc < m &&\n    (exists h: nat :: IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, h));\n  ghost var ghalf: nat :| IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n\n  // Loop 1: find first row with 'B'\n  var ly := 0;\n  while ly < |grid| && 'B' !in grid[ly]\n    invariant 0 <= ly <= gcr - ghalf\n    decreases gcr - ghalf - ly\n  {\n    RowInsideHasBlack(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf, gcr - ghalf);\n    ly := ly + 1;\n  }\n  if ly < gcr - ghalf {\n    RowOutsideHasNoBlack(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf, ly);\n    assert false;\n  }\n  assert ly == gcr - ghalf;\n\n  // Loop 2: find first row after ly without 'B'\n  var ry := ly + 1;\n  while ry < |grid| && 'B' in grid[ry]\n    invariant gcr - ghalf < ry <= gcr + ghalf + 1\n    decreases gcr + ghalf + 1 - ry\n  {\n    if ry > gcr + ghalf {\n      RowOutsideHasNoBlack(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf, ry);\n      assert false;\n    }\n    ry := ry + 1;\n  }\n  if ry <= gcr + ghalf {\n    RowInsideHasBlack(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf, ry);\n    assert false;\n  }\n  assert ry == gcr + ghalf + 1;\n\n  // Loop 3: find first 'B' column in row ly\n  var lx := 0;\n  while lx < |grid[ly]| && grid[ly][lx] != 'B'\n    invariant 0 <= lx <= gcc - ghalf\n    decreases gcc - ghalf - lx\n  {\n    assert CellInSquare(ly, gcc - ghalf, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n    assert grid[ly][gcc - ghalf] == 'B';\n    lx := lx + 1;\n  }\n  if lx < gcc - ghalf {\n    assert !CellInSquare(ly, lx, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n    assert grid[ly][lx] == 'W';\n    assert false;\n  }\n  assert lx == gcc - ghalf;\n\n  // Loop 4: find first non-'B' column after lx\n  var rx := lx + 1;\n  while rx < |grid[ly]| && grid[ly][rx] == 'B'\n    invariant gcc - ghalf < rx <= gcc + ghalf + 1\n    decreases gcc + ghalf + 1 - rx\n  {\n    if rx > gcc + ghalf {\n      assert !CellInSquare(ly, rx, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n      assert grid[ly][rx] == 'W';\n      assert false;\n    }\n    rx := rx + 1;\n  }\n  if rx <= gcc + ghalf {\n    assert CellInSquare(ly, rx, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n    assert grid[ly][rx] == 'B';\n    assert false;\n  }\n  assert rx == gcc + ghalf + 1;\n\n  // Compute center\n  var y := (ly + ry) / 2;\n  var x := (lx + rx) / 2;\n  r := y + 1;\n  c := x + 1;\n\n  assert ly + ry == 2 * gcr + 1;\n  assert lx + rx == 2 * gcc + 1;\n  assert r - 1 == gcr;\n  assert c - 1 == gcc;\n  assert IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, r - 1, c - 1, ghalf);\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":161,"oldLines":8,"newStart":161,"newLines":13,"lines":["   c := x + 1;"," ","   assert ly + ry == 2 * gcr + 1;","+  assert y == gcr;","   assert lx + rx == 2 * gcc + 1;","+  assert x == gcc;","   assert r - && m > 0 && |grid| == n &&\n  (forall i | 0 <= i < n :: |grid[i]| == m) &&\n  (forall i | 0 <= i < n :: forall j | 0 <= j < m ::\n    grid[i][j] == 'W' || grid[i][j] == 'B')\n}\n\n// A cell (i,j) lies inside the axis-aligned square with given center and half-side-length\nghost predicate CellInSquare(i: int, j: int, centerRow: int, centerCol: int, half: int)\n{\n  centerRow - half <= i <= centerRow + half &&\n  centerCol - half <= j <= centerCol + half\n}\n\n// The grid consists of exactly one black square of side length 2*half+1 (odd)\n// centered at (centerRow, centerCol) in 0-indexed coordinates, with all other cells white\nghost predicate IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>,\n                                   centerRow: int, centerCol: int, half: int)\n  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < n :: |grid[i]| == m\n{\n  half >= 0 &&\n  centerRow - half >= 0 && centerRow + half < n &&\n  centerCol - half >= 0 && centerCol + half < m &&\n  (forall i | 0 <= i < n ::\n    forall j | 0 <= j < m ::\n      if CellInSquare(i, j, centerRow, centerCol, half)\n      then grid[i][j] == 'B'\n      else grid[i][j] == 'W')\n}\n\n// There exists some black square painted on the grid\nghost predicate HasBlackSquare(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>)\n  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < n :: |grid[i]| == m\n{\n  exists cr | 0 <= cr < n ::\n    exists cc | 0 <= cc < m ::\n      exists h: nat ::\n        IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, cr, cc, h)\n}\n\nlemma RowOutsideHasNoBlack(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>, cr: int, cc: int, half: int, i: int)\n  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n  requires forall ii | 0 <= ii < n :: |grid[ii]| == m\n  requires IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, cr, cc, half)\n  requires 0 <= i < n\n  requires i < cr - half || i > cr + half\n  ensures 'B' !in grid[i]\n{\n  forall j | 0 <= j < |grid[i]|\n    ensures grid[i][j] != 'B'\n  {\n    assert !CellInSquare(i, j, cr, cc, half);\n  }\n}\n\nlemma RowInsideHasBlack(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>, cr: int, cc: int, half: int, i: int)\n  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0\n  requires forall ii | 0 <= ii < n :: |grid[ii]| == m\n  requires IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, cr, cc, half)\n  requires 0 <= i < n\n  requires cr - half <= i <= cr + half\n  ensures 'B' in grid[i]\n{\n  assert CellInSquare(i, cc, cr, cc, half);\n  assert 0 <= cc < |grid[i]|;\n  assert grid[i][cc] == 'B';\n}\n\nmethod FindSquare(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>) returns (r: int, c: int)\n  requires ValidGrid(n, m, grid)\n  requires HasBlackSquare(n, m, grid)\n  ensures 1 <= r <= n && 1 <= c <= m\n  ensures exists h: nat ::\n            IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, r - 1, c - 1, h)\n{\n  // Extract ghost witnesses from HasBlackSquare\n  ghost var gcr: int :| 0 <= gcr < n &&\n    (exists cc | 0 <= cc < m :: exists h: nat ::\n      IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, gcr, cc, h));\n  ghost var gcc: int :| 0 <= gcc < m &&\n    (exists h: nat :: IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, h));\n  ghost var ghalf: nat :| IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n\n  // Loop 1: find first row with 'B'\n  var ly := 0;\n  while ly < |grid| && 'B' !in grid[ly]\n    invariant 0 <= ly <= gcr - ghalf\n    decreases gcr - ghalf - ly\n  {\n    RowInsideHasBlack(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf, gcr - ghalf);\n    ly := ly + 1;\n  }\n  if ly < gcr - ghalf {\n    RowOutsideHasNoBlack(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf, ly);\n    assert false;\n  }\n  assert ly == gcr - ghalf;\n\n  // Loop 2: find first row after ly without 'B'\n  var ry := ly + 1;\n  while ry < |grid| && 'B' in grid[ry]\n    invariant gcr - ghalf < ry <= gcr + ghalf + 1\n    decreases gcr + ghalf + 1 - ry\n  {\n    if ry > gcr + ghalf {\n      RowOutsideHasNoBlack(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf, ry);\n      assert false;\n    }\n    ry := ry + 1;\n  }\n  if ry <= gcr + ghalf {\n    RowInsideHasBlack(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf, ry);\n    assert false;\n  }\n  assert ry == gcr + ghalf + 1;\n\n  // Loop 3: find first 'B' column in row ly\n  var lx := 0;\n  while lx < |grid[ly]| && grid[ly][lx] != 'B'\n    invariant 0 <= lx <= gcc - ghalf\n    decreases gcc - ghalf - lx\n  {\n    assert CellInSquare(ly, gcc - ghalf, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n    assert grid[ly][gcc - ghalf] == 'B';\n    lx := lx + 1;\n  }\n  if lx < gcc - ghalf {\n    assert !CellInSquare(ly, lx, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n    assert grid[ly][lx] == 'W';\n    assert false;\n  }\n  assert lx == gcc - ghalf;\n\n  // Loop 4: find first non-'B' column after lx\n  var rx := lx + 1;\n  while rx < |grid[ly]| && grid[ly][rx] == 'B'\n    invariant gcc - ghalf < rx <= gcc + ghalf + 1\n    decreases gcc + ghalf + 1 - rx\n  {\n    if rx > gcc + ghalf {\n      assert !CellInSquare(ly, rx, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n      assert grid[ly][rx] == 'W';\n      assert false;\n    }\n    rx := rx + 1;\n  }\n  if rx <= gcc + ghalf {\n    assert CellInSquare(ly, rx, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n    assert grid[ly][rx] == 'B';\n    assert false;\n  }\n  assert rx == gcc + ghalf + 1;\n\n  // Compute center\n  var y := (ly + ry) / 2;\n  var x := (lx + rx) / 2;\n  r := y + 1;\n  c := x + 1;\n\n  assert ly + ry == 2 * gcr + 1;\n  assert y == gcr;\n  assert lx + rx == 2 * gcc + 1;\n  assert x == gcc;\n  assert r - 1 == gcr;\n  assert c - 1 == gcc;\n  assert 1 <= r <= n;\n  assert 1 <= c <= m;\n  assert IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, r - 1, c - 1, ghalf);\n  assert exists h: nat :: IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, r - 1, c - 1, ghost var gcc: int :| 0 <= gcc < m &&\n    (exists h: nat :: IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, h));\n  ghost var ghalf: nat :| IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n, m, grid, gcr, gcc, ghalf);\n\n  //
